title: next_output
description: Schema for the JSON payload emitted on stdout by `/livespec:next` (the spec-side thin-transport ranker). Pure function of `<spec-target>/proposed_changes/` queue depth + oldest-proposal age + `<spec-target>/history/` unpruned version count. No LLM in the ranking path; no impl-side store reads.

action.description: The most ripe action to invoke next, or `none` when no spec-side work is pressing. `capture-work-item` is the cross-boundary exception — emitted by the ranker per `SPECIFICATION/contracts.md` §"/livespec:next spec-side thin-transport skill" → "Ranker semantics" when a `revise` candidate would fail the `unresolved-spec-commitment` invariant; the action value names the impl-plugin's `capture-work-item` skill (not a livespec-side action), and the user resolves by filing the named work-items via that skill before re-invoking revise.

reason.description: Human-readable narration of the ranking decision (queue depth, oldest-proposal age, history version count).

urgency.description: Bucketed urgency derived from queue depth and oldest-proposal age. `none`-action payloads always emit `low`.
